title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers video demonstrating how to build AI agents using a loop pattern with the Strands Agents SDK. The video walks through four examples: a single-tool agent, multi-tool agent with model selection, agent with hooks for visibility, and a multi-agent orchestrator.
